name: Zwetschgendatsche (Damson Plum Tart)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 kg Damson plums, rinsed, pitted (3 1/4 lbs)
30 g Butter for greasing cookie sheet (2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
Dough:
1. Prepare a yeast dough.
2. Grease a cookie sheet and dust it with breadcrumbs.
3. On the prepared sheet, roll out the dough to about finger thickness.
4. Along the edges, pull up the dough to form a rim.
5. Place the tart in the oven and bake at medium heat for 40 to 45 minutes.
Filling:
6. Arrange tightly arranged plum halves (at a slight angle) on top of the dough.
7. Dust with cinnamon.
8. Once done baking, dust with sugar.
Serves 4.
